title: bossiaea nummularia
intro: Bossiaea nummularia, also known as the coin bush or Australian coin bush, is a flowering plant native to the eastern and southern regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, providing relief from congestion, pain, and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Bossiaea nummularia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
